subject: Dimple, a bright green globular spirit entity with a wide smug grin, floating against a green-yellow background
description: A small, round, bright green floating spirit entity fills the upper portion of the card art. The entity has a wide, toothy smug grin with red-accented cheeks and small expressive eyes, giving it a self-satisfied comedic presence. The creature is clearly weightless and hovering, with no visible limbs. The background is a warm yellow-green gradient that complements the creature's coloring. The flavor text reads 'Calm down.' — the art delivers the opposite: supreme smug satisfaction. This is an immediately recognizable green spirit-ghost form consistent with Dimple's depiction across Mob Psycho 100 animated media.
foreground: small round green floating spirit with wide smug grin and red-accented cheeks
emotion: supreme smug self-satisfaction, wide grin, elevated brow suggesting condescension
